brand_identity.name: ETI Educom
brand_identity.mission: Empowering Education Counselors with Precision Tools

rules: Headings (h1-h3) must use Manrope with tight tracking (-0.02em).
Body text must use Public Sans for maximum legibility in dense tables.
Labels and overlines must be uppercase, tracking-widest, and text-xs.

lead_table.row_hover: hover:bg-slate-50 hover:scale-[1.002] transition-all duration-200 ease-out cursor-pointer

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md h-10 px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings. Use Manrope.
DO NOT use teal (#1B93A4) for any UI element.
Lead Management Table must use 'TanStack Table' (react-table) logic with customized UI.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Do NOT use gradients for text.
Add 'dark:bg-slate-950' and 'dark:text-slate-50' support even if light mode is default.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the typography first in tailwind.config.js.
2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar structure.
3. Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy defined above.
4. Implement the Lead Management Table with sorting, filtering, and pagination.
5. Use the provided image URLs for the Login page and Course thumbnails.
6. Ensure all API calls to MSG91 are mocked or handled via a service layer.
